name: aio-golang-mastery
description: Complete Go development skill with lint mode (7-step tooling chain: build, vet, golangci-lint, govulncheck, nilaway, deadcode, race detection). Covers idiomatic patterns, error handling, concurrency, interfaces, generics, testing, project structure, production hardening, and gRPC. Based on Google/Uber style guides. Updated for Go 1.25.
